card.text: High Five a volunteer in the Library
Find someone who hates coffee (and commiserate with them about the joyless life they lead
Post a pic on Facebook playing a non PTW Title w/ #MCC2026Bingo
Find a game to play using the discord channel: MCC2026players-wanted(answer or add a post)
Find a game being played (or play one) that was published before 2010
Play a game with no text (outside of the rulebook)

Encrypted Transmission

transmission.title: Transmission #3
transmission.intro: HQ has intercepted a signal. Review the documentation and submit your findings.
transmission.question: A farmer has 17 sheep. All but 9 die. How many are left?

correct.title: Full Decryption
body: All but 9 of the farmer's sheep die.
We searched the records. We followed the evidence. In the end, only one clue remained...Lightning never strikes at random.

incorrect.title: Partial Decryption
body: All but 9 of the farmer's sheep die.
The remaining suspects share too much in common. Fortunately, only one bears the mark of the storm.

card.text: Exchange your vendor raffle ticket with someone you just met - note the # you gave away on Discord Channel MCC2026-vendor-raffle
Ask for a recommendation from a random person in the library. Tag on Facebook w/ #MCC2026-Title of game and if you're going to play it!
Encrypted Transmission

transmission.title: Transmission #1
transmission.intro: HQ has intercepted a signal. Review the documentation and submit your findings.
transmission.question: A detective enters a room. The window is open. The curtains are blowing. Papers are everywhere. What is the strongest evidence of a break-in?

correct.title: Full Decryption
body: What evidence is there of a break-in?

HQ has identified the source material of all the organizers' recommendations. Search the convention's 'do the thing to win the thing' archive. Somewhere among those recrods is teh evidence you will need to find the meeple (who is among us!).

incorrect.title: Partial Decryption
body: What evidence is there of a break-in?
The suspected mepple didn't hide any evidence in plain sight. HQ suspects it was hidden in the organizers' rewards records.

card.text: Post a pic on Facebook of the cookie you (or someone else) got w/ #MCC2026ConCookies
Find someone who has been to each MCC (besides Rick, Ben or Katherine) - post their first name on discord channel MCC2026-everytimer
Post on Facebook the PTW game you MOST want to win w/ #MCC2026GameIWant
Find a game with Metal Money - name the game on discord channel MCC2026-upgradedgames
Find someone who has never played a train game (NEVER EVER)
Play a game with someone you just met - what game? would you play again?
Take a picture of a dexerity game being played - and post on Facebook w/ #MCC2026-Dexterity+20
Take a picture of a game being played with 5 or more players. Post on Facebook with tag #MCC2026SoManyGames
Find someone who is attending a gaming convention for the first time in their life!
Get someone to teach you a drafting game you've not played before
Encrypted Transmission

transmission.title: Transmission #2
transmission.intro: HQ has intercepted a signal. Review the documentation and submit your findings.
transmission.question: Mary's father has five daughters: Nana, Nene, Nini, Nono. What is the name of the fifth daughter?

correct.title: Full Decryption
body: We pursued two false trails. One led us across unexplored frontiers guided by drafted adventure cards. The other vanished beneath ancient boughs where we walked among fairy folk and towering menhirs and where mistletoe grows. Both were convincing. Both were wrong.

incorrect.title: Partial Decryption
body: Not every adventure is worth following. Ignore the call of distant frontiers and the whispers of the old forest.

card.text: Invite someone to sit down at your table and play a game - or find out a game they've played today. Tell us about it on discord!
